command: MT5='/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5' && echo '=== Default chart01.chr ===' && cat "$MT5/MQL5/Profiles/Charts/Default/chart01.chr" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\0' && echo '=== Default order.wnd ===' && cat "$MT5/MQL5/Profiles/Charts/Default/order.wnd" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\0' && echo '=== Any chart with EA reference ===' && grep -rl -i 'PropFirm\|expert_name' "$MT5/MQL5/Profiles/" 2>/dev/null && echo '=== MT5 terminal log last 30 ===' && TLOG=$(ls -t "$MT5/logs/"*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$TLOG" ]; then tail -30 "$TLOG" | tr -d '\0'; fi && echo '=== EA log today ===' && cat "$MT5/MQL5/Logs/20260226.log" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\0' | tail -20 && echo '=== EA log latest ===' && EALOG=$(ls -t "$MT5/MQL5/Logs/"*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$EALOG" ]; then echo "File: $EALOG"; tail -20 "$EALOG" | tr -d '\0'; fi
